textPlain: Personally I think we should be putting more focus on pedagogy. Beyond primary school, education is more zero-sum signaling and specialization.Rapid growth has always been brought about by improvements in productivity, brought about by better machines in manufacturing in the past. But for white collar jobs we've barely been doing that, instead relying on squeezing successive generations for a static pool of talent.Imagine a world in which the SAT is an afterthought where everyone can max easily. That would do way more to change your day to day life than the latest EV or HSR.
